primary.description: Deep Navy - Represents Authority and Trust

accent.description: Vibrant Orange - For high-priority actions (Create Quote, Upgrade)

usage_rules: NEVER use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise.
Use Primary (Navy) for Sidebar and Main Headings.
Use Accent (Orange) ONLY for the primary 'Call to Action' (e.g., 'Create New Quote').
Backgrounds should be slightly off-white (Slate-50) to reduce eye strain, while Cards remain Pure White.

visual_enhancers.noise_texture: opacity-20 pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 mix-blend-overlay bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]
visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: Use for 'Pro Plan' cards or 'Active' states in navigation.

dashboard.structure: Sidebar (Fixed Left) + Header (Sticky Top) + Main Content (Scrollable)

widgets.summary: col-span-1 bg-white p-6 border border-slate-100 rounded-md
widgets.chart: col-span-2 row-span-2 bg-white p-6 border border-slate-100 rounded-md
widgets.list: col-span-1 row-span-2 bg-white p-0 border border-slate-100 rounded-md overflow-hidden

quote_builder.structure: Left: Form Inputs (Scrollable) | Right: PDF Preview (Sticky)

marketing.hero_alignment: Left Aligned Text, Right Aligned Visual (3D or High-Res Image)

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-6 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.accent: bg-accent text-accent-foreground hover:bg-accent/90 h-10 px-6 rounded-md font-bold shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all active:scale-95

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-md shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.style: h-10 rounded-md border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

status_badges.success: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
status_badges.pending: bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border border-amber-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
status_badges.error: bg-red-50 text-red-700 border border-red-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for text or backgrounds. Keep it flat and clean.
Ensure all interactive elements have a `data-testid` attribute.
For the PDF Preview, use an `iframe` or a dedicated PDF viewer component.
All currency values must be formatted with Turkish Lira symbol (₺) and proper locale (tr-TR).
Date formats must be DD.MM.YYYY (Turkish standard).
Input fields for currency should align text to the right.
Use 'Skeleton' loaders for data fetching states, never simple spinners.
The 'Create Quote' flow is the core feature. It must be frictionless. Use 'Sheet' (Side Drawer) for quick product addition during quote creation.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-end SaaS for Turkish SMEs. The design must feel 'expensive' but simple. Follow the color palette strictly. Use the provided image URLs. Implement the 'Bento Grid' layout for the dashboard. Ensure the Quote Builder is a split-screen experience (Input Left, Preview Right). Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all financial data (IBAN, Prices, Totals).
